# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent sqs policy too permissive.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

Resources: 
    MyQueue:   # SQS Queue resource name definition here, you can use any valid AWS CloudFormation logical ID or alias for this queue in your template (e.g., "MyServerlessEventProcessingArchitecture")
        Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'  # Define the type of resources to be created by cloudformation yaml file here, SQS Queue is defined as a resource now  
        
    MySNSTopic:     # SNStopic name definition in CloudFormation YAML template. You can use any valid AWS logical ID or alias for this topic (e.g., "MyServerlessEventProcessingArchitectureTopic") 
        Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'   # Define the type of resources to be created by cloudformation yaml file here, SNS Topic is defined as a resource now   
        
# Setup IAM Role and Policy for AWS Lambda Function. This role will have permission set up in CloudFormation template 
ExecutionRole: arn:aws:iam::account-id:role/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole   # Replace account id with your actual aws_account ID here, you can use this IAM Role for Lambda function. This role should have permission to access SQS and SNSTopic in the same region
